items.title: Capital Adequacy Ratio (CAR)
items.description: Maintain minimum CAR of 15% as per RBI guidelines for NBFCs
items.notes: CAR at 18.5%, well above minimum requirement

items.title: KYC Compliance
items.description: 100% KYC completion for all active customers
items.notes: 3.2% of customers have pending KYC renewal — 847 accounts flagged

items.title: Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR)
items.description: Maintain LCR above 100% for systemic liquidity management

items.title: NPA Classification
items.description: Non-Performing Assets must be classified per IRACP norms
items.notes: Gross NPA at 2.1%, within acceptable limits

items.title: AML Transaction Monitoring
items.description: All transactions above ₹10L must be screened for AML compliance
items.notes: 11% of high-value transactions missed automated screening — remediation in progress

items.title: Insider Trading Policy
items.description: All employees must acknowledge updated insider trading policy
items.notes: All 342 employees have acknowledged the policy

items.title: Quarterly Disclosure Filing
items.description: File quarterly disclosures with SEBI within 45 days of quarter end
items.notes: Q1 2025 disclosure due May 15, 2025 — drafting in progress

items.title: Data Backup Verification
items.description: Daily backup integrity checks must pass 100%
items.notes: All backups verified successfully for last 30 days

items.title: Access Control Review
items.description: Quarterly review of user access rights and privileges
items.notes: Q1 2025 access review overdue — 23 accounts with elevated privileges under review

items.title: Security Patch Management
items.description: All systems must be patched within 30 days of critical CVE release
items.notes: 3 production servers have critical patches pending > 30 days — CVE-2025-1847, CVE-2025-2103
